strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (as seen in Optilyz and RIDE Capital)
Strong background in pragmatic, scalable architecture with PostgreSQL-equivalent (MongoDB, SQL) and AWS services
Demonstrated interest in clean software practices (TDD, CI/CD) and collaboration through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Over-qualified for a junior/mid-level role with 13+ years of senior-level experience and leadership roles
Recent career gap (Oct 2025–Present) with no clear explanation or recent work samples
Limited direct exposure to PostgreSQL or Nest.js, with most backend work in Node.js or other languages (D, Java)
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional fullstack capabilities with deep expertise in TypeScript, React, and scalable architectures, aligning well with the technical stack. However, their senior-level experience and recent career gap may pose misalignment with the junior/mid-level role's expectations and on-site requirements. Their pragmatic approach to clean software and collaboration skills are strong assets.
